task_completion.description: Verify the Sygic GPS Navigation app is launched.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Sygic app interface, such as the main map view or startup screen, is visible on the device.

task_completion.description: Verify the main menu of the Sygic app is opened.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The side navigation drawer or main menu panel is expanded and visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Verify the Settings menu is accessed.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Settings' screen of the Sygic app is displayed, showing various configuration categories.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Route & Navigation' (or similar routing) settings section is opened.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The screen displays routing-specific preferences, typically under a header like 'Route & Navigation'.

task_completion.description: Verify the specific setting to avoid motorways or highways is located on the screen.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An option labeled 'Avoid motorways', 'Avoid highways', or similar is clearly visible in the list of routing preferences.

task_completion.description: Verify the setting to avoid motorways/highways is enabled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The toggle switch, checkbox, or selection indicator next to the 'Avoid motorways' or 'Avoid highways' option is in the active/ON state.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the graphical user interface rather than using terminal commands.
integrity.visual_evidence: The trajectory shows standard touch interactions (taps, scrolls) within the app UI, without terminal emulators or command-line interfaces being used to modify preference files directly.

integrity.description: Verify the agent is configuring the actual Sygic application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface belongs to the Sygic GPS Navigation app, not a web browser searching for instructions, a text editor, or a different navigation app.

integrity.description: Verify the agent targeted the correct avoidance setting without indiscriminately toggling unrelated settings.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent specifically interacts with the motorway/highway avoidance setting and does not unnecessarily toggle distinct negative keyword settings like 'ferries', 'toll roads', or 'unpaved roads'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires configuring the Sygic GPS Navigation app to avoid motorways. Target keywords for this setting include 'motorway', 'highway', 'avoid', and 'routing'. This setting is typically located by navigating to Menu > Settings > Route & Navigation. Note that 'ferry', 'toll', and 'unpaved' are distinct avoidance settings in the same menu and should not be confused with the motorway/highway avoidance requirement.
